title: 2nd Platoon

'''2nd Platoon''' was one of four [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Platoon/Legends|platoons]] that served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic's]] [[Bacta Company]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="Insider 84" />

Serving under the joint [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of [[Clone Lieutenant/Legends|clone trooper lieutenant]] [[Barr]],<ref name="Insider 84" /> and a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Sergeant major/Legends|sergeant major]],<ref name="SGM" /> 2nd Platoon was comprised of thirty-two clone [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] and four [[Clone medic/Legends|clone trooper medics]]. The platoon had four [[Squad/Legends|squads]] under its command, including [[Talon Squad]], a squad of nine troopers led by [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|clone trooper sergeant]] [[Green (clone)|Green]].<ref name="Insider 84" />

==Behind the scenes==
2nd Platoon was first mentioned in "[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]," an eight-page reference article written by [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]] and [[Karen Traviss]] for the [[Star Wars Insider 84|eighty-fourth]] issue of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'',<ref name="Insider 84" /> published by [[IDG Entertainment]] on [[September 26]], [[2005]].<ref name="Insider 84 Date">{{SWArchive|url=community/fanclub/mag/news20050913.html|text=The Ultimate Clone Guide in ''Star Wars Insider'' #84}}</ref>
